title: The Stock Picking Philosophy to Find the Next Amazon: Masters in Business
summary: Barry speaks with David Gardner, Author and Co-Founder, at The Motley Fool. They discuss David's new book "Rule Breaker Investing: How to Pick the Best Stocks of the Future and Build Lasting Wealth." They also discuss the pros and cons of different investing strategies and trends. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman, JPMorgan Show Wall Street’s Split in Quantum Computing Race
summary: As a breakthrough proves elusive in the quest to deploy the nascent technology and boost earnings, global finance is divided on how to proceed.

title: Record-Setting Momentum Rally Is Drawing Doubters
summary: April’s rally in risk assets has weathered stalled peace talks, signs of resurgent inflation and a central-bank succession drama. Investors may be about to find out if the speed of the advance itself poses a threat to a further ascent.

title: Bond Traders Await Powell Update, Slate of US Treasury Auctions
summary: Traders in the US Treasury market are turning their focus to this week’s Federal Reserve meeting to gauge how officials are assessing the outlook for inflation as tensions in the Middle East keep oil prices elevated.

Fed Set to Lead Uneasy G-7 With Rates Kept on Hold This Week
summary: Policymakers in the US and across the Group of Seven will probably keep interest rates steady this week while watching nervously for signs of higher energy costs fanning inflation.
